---
title: "Figure 5 — *K. pneumoniae* Phylogenetic Tree with Metadata Annotation"
author: "Ebenezer Foster-Nyarko"
date: today
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    code-fold: show
    theme: cosmo
    embed-resources: true
  pdf:
    toc: true
    colorlinks: true
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
---

<!--
Paper: Foster-Nyarko E et al. medRxiv (2026). https://doi.org/10.64898/2026.03.03.26347025.

Maximum-likelihood phylogenetic tree of all K. pneumoniae isolates, annotated with:
  - Tree branches and tips coloured by ST (top 10 + Other in grey)
  - Tip label suffixes: * = environmental isolate, ** = IV fluid isolate
  - Ring 1 (K-locus): capsular polysaccharide type (top 10 + Other in grey)
  - Ring 2 (Virulence): acquired virulence loci (red = present)
  - Ring 3 (Genotypic AMR): acquired resistance genes (blue = present)
  - Ring 4 (AMR mutations): acquired resistance mutations (orange = present)

Data required (place in data/):
  - gm_kpn_kleborate.csv       : Pathogenwatch Kleborate export for all Gambia Kp isolates
                                  (columns include: Genome_Name, ST, K_locus, virulence
                                  and AMR gene/mutation columns)
  - gm_kpn_tree.nwk            : Newick tree from Pathogenwatch (all Gambia Kp collection)
  - FileS1_to_FileS10.xlsx     : Supplementary data file published with paper;
                                  sheet "FileS3" must contain columns:
                                  sample_id, Status (Environmental / Neonate / Non-neonate),
                                  and optionally source_type (e.g. "IV bag", "water", etc.)

Data source: Pathogenwatch collection 4qpq72t9efqt (Gambia Kpn collection, updated Oct 2024)

R packages: ggtree, ggtreeExtra, tidyverse, ggnewscale, RColorBrewer, readxl, ape
BiocManager::install("ggtree")
BiocManager::install("ggtreeExtra")
install.packages(c("ggnewscale", "RColorBrewer", "readxl"))
-->

## Setup

```{r setup}
library(ggtree)
library(ggtreeExtra)
library(ape)
library(tidyverse)
library(ggnewscale)
library(RColorBrewer)
library(readxl)
```

## File Paths

```{r file-paths}
fp_kleborate  <- "data/gm_kpn_kleborate.csv"
fp_tree       <- "data/gm_kpn_tree.nwk"
fp_supp       <- "data/FileS1_to_FileS10.xlsx"   # sheet "FileS3" — study isolates
out_dir       <- "."
```

## Load Data

### Genomic metadata and phylogenetic tree

```{r load-genomic}
metadata <- read.csv(fp_kleborate) %>%
  select(-any_of("label")) %>%   # drop pre-existing label col if present in export
  rename(label = Genome_Name)

tree <- read.tree(fp_tree)

cat("Metadata rows :", nrow(metadata), "\n")
cat("Tree tips     :", length(tree$tip.label), "\n")
cat("\nFirst 5 tip labels:\n")
print(head(tree$tip.label))
```

### Sample-type metadata (for asterisk tip labels)

```{r load-sample-type}
# Load isolate metadata from supplementary file
supp_raw <- read_excel(fp_supp, sheet = "FileS3")
has_source_type <- "source_type" %in% names(supp_raw)

supp <- supp_raw %>%
  mutate(
    id = as.character(id) %>% str_trim(),
    sample_category = case_when(
      str_to_lower(Status) == "environmental" ~ "Environmental",
      Status %in% c("Neonate", "Non-neonate")  ~ "Clinical",
      TRUE ~ "Other"
    ),
    is_iv_fluid = if (has_source_type) {
      str_detect(str_to_lower(source_type), "iv|bag")
    } else {
      FALSE
    }
  ) %>%
  select(id, sample_category, is_iv_fluid)

cat("Sample categories in supplementary file:\n")
print(table(supp$sample_category, useNA = "ifany"))
cat("\nIV fluid samples:", sum(supp$is_iv_fluid, na.rm = TRUE), "\n")
```

```{r check-label-matching}
# Standardise sample IDs so they match tree tip labels
# Pathogenwatch often uses the sample name as the Genome_Name — inspect and adjust
# the cleaning step below if your IDs use different formatting.
supp <- supp %>%
  mutate(label = id %>%
           str_trim() %>%
           str_replace_all("[[:space:]]+", "_"))

# Diagnostic: which tree tips are matched?
matched   <- intersect(tree$tip.label, supp$label)
unmatched <- setdiff(tree$tip.label, supp$label)

cat("\nTree tips matched to supplementary metadata:", length(matched), "\n")
cat("Tree tips NOT matched (no sample-type info):", length(unmatched), "\n")
if (length(unmatched) > 0 && length(unmatched) <= 20) {
  cat("Unmatched tips:", paste(unmatched, collapse = ", "), "\n")
}
```

## Build Tip-Label Suffix Table

```{r tip-suffixes}
# Assign asterisk suffix based on sample category:
#   **  = isolated from intravenous fluids
#   *   = other environmental isolate
#   ""  = clinical isolate (no suffix)
#   ""  = historical / no metadata (no suffix)

tip_labels <- tibble(label = tree$tip.label) %>%
  left_join(supp %>% select(label, sample_category, is_iv_fluid),
            by = "label") %>%
  mutate(
    suffix = case_when(
      !is.na(is_iv_fluid) & is_iv_fluid              ~ "**",
      !is.na(sample_category) & sample_category == "Environmental" ~ "*",
      TRUE ~ ""
    ),
    label_display = paste0(label, suffix)
  )

cat("\nTip label suffix counts:\n")
print(table(tip_labels$suffix, useNA = "ifany"))
cat("\nSample environmental tips (first 10):\n")
print(tip_labels %>% filter(suffix != "") %>% select(label, suffix) %>% head(10))
```

```{r join-display-labels}
# Add display labels back into the main metadata table so ggtree can use them
metadata <- metadata %>%
  left_join(tip_labels %>% select(label, label_display, suffix, sample_category),
            by = "label")

# Sanity check
cat("\nRows with a suffix:\n")
print(metadata %>% count(suffix))
```

## Prepare Annotation Data

```{r process-st-klocus}
top_10_st     <- metadata %>% count(ST, sort = TRUE) %>% slice_head(n = 10) %>% pull(ST)
top_10_klocus <- metadata %>% count(K_locus, sort = TRUE) %>% slice_head(n = 10) %>% pull(K_locus)

metadata <- metadata %>%
  mutate(
    ST_category      = if_else(ST %in% top_10_st,     as.character(ST),      "Other"),
    K_locus_category = if_else(K_locus %in% top_10_klocus, as.character(K_locus), "Other")
  )

cat("Top 10 STs:", paste(sort(top_10_st), collapse = ", "), "\n")
```

```{r define-columns}
genotypic_cols <- c(
  "AGly_acquired", "Col_acquired", "Fcyn_acquired", "Flq_acquired", "Gly_acquired",
  "MLS_acquired",  "Phe_acquired", "Rif_acquired",  "Sul_acquired", "Tet_acquired",
  "Tgc_acquired",  "Tmt_acquired", "Bla_acquired",  "Bla_inhR_acquired",
  "Bla_ESBL_acquired", "Bla_ESBL_inhR_acquired", "Bla_Carb_acquired", "Bla_chr"
)
# Keep only columns that are actually present in the export
genotypic_cols <- genotypic_cols[genotypic_cols %in% names(metadata)]

mutation_cols  <- c("SHV_mutations", "Omp_mutations", "Col_mutations", "Flq_mutations")
mutation_cols  <- mutation_cols[mutation_cols %in% names(metadata)]

virulence_cols <- c("Yersiniabactin", "Colibactin", "Aerobactin",
                    "Salmochelin", "RmpADC", "rmpA2")
virulence_cols <- virulence_cols[virulence_cols %in% names(metadata)]

cat("Genotypic AMR columns found:", length(genotypic_cols), "\n")
cat("Mutation columns found     :", length(mutation_cols), "\n")
cat("Virulence columns found    :", length(virulence_cols), "\n")
```

```{r process-resistance}
convert_to_binary <- function(x) {
  case_when(is.na(x) ~ 0, x == "-" ~ 0, x == "" ~ 0, TRUE ~ 1)
}

metadata <- metadata %>%
  mutate(
    across(all_of(genotypic_cols), convert_to_binary),
    across(all_of(mutation_cols),  convert_to_binary),
    across(all_of(virulence_cols), convert_to_binary)
  )

# Ciprofloxacin phenotypic prediction (if present)
if ("Ciprofloxacin_prediction" %in% names(metadata)) {
  metadata <- metadata %>%
    mutate(Ciprofloxacin_mut = case_when(
      Ciprofloxacin_prediction == "nonwildtype R" ~ 1,
      Ciprofloxacin_prediction == "wildtype S"    ~ 0,
      TRUE ~ NA_real_
    ))
  mutation_cols <- c(mutation_cols, "Ciprofloxacin_mut")
}
```

```{r reshape-annotation-data}
sample_type_data <- tibble(label = tree$tip.label) %>%
  left_join(metadata %>% select(label, sample_category), by = "label") %>%
  mutate(variable = "Sample type",
         value    = coalesce(sample_category, "Unknown"))

klocus_data <- metadata %>%
  select(label, K_locus_category) %>% distinct() %>%
  mutate(variable = "K-locus", value = K_locus_category) %>%
  select(label, variable, value)

virulence_data <- metadata %>%
  select(label, all_of(virulence_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-label, names_to = "Trait", values_to = "Presence")

genotypic_data <- metadata %>%
  select(label, all_of(genotypic_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-label, names_to = "Gene", values_to = "Presence") %>%
  mutate(Gene = str_remove(Gene, "_acquired$"))

mutation_data <- metadata %>%
  select(label, all_of(mutation_cols)) %>%
  pivot_longer(-label, names_to = "Mutation", values_to = "Presence") %>%
  mutate(Mutation = str_remove(Mutation, "_mutations?$") %>%
                    str_replace("Ciprofloxacin_mut", "Cipro (phenotypic)"))
```

## Colour Palettes

```{r create-palettes}
st_colors <- c(brewer.pal(min(length(top_10_st), 10), "Set3"), "grey70")
names(st_colors) <- c(sort(top_10_st), "Other")

klocus_colors <- c(brewer.pal(min(length(top_10_klocus), 10), "Paired"), "grey70")
names(klocus_colors) <- c(sort(top_10_klocus), "Other")

sample_type_colors <- c("Clinical" = "#4393C3", "Environmental" = "#2CA25F",
                        "Other" = "#AEAEAE", "Unknown" = "grey90")
```

## Build Annotated Tree

```{r create-tree, fig.width=22, fig.height=18}
# --- Base tree ---
# %<+% internally calls dplyr::rename(metadata, label = 1); if column 1 is
# already named "label", newer vctrs rejects it as a duplicate. Fix: pass
# metadata with column 1 temporarily renamed so %<+% has no conflict.
p <- ggtree(tree, layout = "rectangular") %<+%
  rename(metadata, .lbl = label)

# Colour branches and tip points by ST
p <- p +
  geom_tree(aes(color = ST_category)) +
  geom_tippoint(aes(color = ST_category), size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(values = st_colors, name = "ST", na.value = "grey50") +
  xlim(0, NA) +
  hexpand(0.35)   # extra horizontal space for tip labels + annotation rings

# --- Tip labels with * / ** suffixes ---
# label_display is blank for internal nodes (isTip = FALSE), so use label_display
# only where it is not NA; fall back to label otherwise.
p <- p +
  geom_tiplab(
    aes(label = if_else(!is.na(label_display), label_display, label)),
    size   = 2.5,
    align  = FALSE,
    offset = 0.001   # small nudge away from tip point; adjust if needed
  )

# --- Ring 0: Sample type (Clinical / Environmental) ---
p <- p +
  new_scale_fill() +
  geom_fruit(
    data    = sample_type_data,
    geom    = geom_tile,
    mapping = aes(y = label, x = variable, fill = value),
    offset  = 0.03,
    pwidth  = 0.06,
    axis.params = list(axis = "x", text = "Sample\ntype", text.angle = 0,
                       text.size = 2.5, hjust = 0.5, nbreak = 1)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = sample_type_colors, name = "Sample type", na.value = "grey90")

# --- Ring 1: K-locus ---
p <- p +
  new_scale_fill() +
  geom_fruit(
    data    = klocus_data,
    geom    = geom_tile,
    mapping = aes(y = label, x = variable, fill = value),
    offset  = 0.03,
    pwidth  = 0.08,
    axis.params = list(axis = "x", text = "K-locus", text.angle = 0,
                       text.size = 2.5, hjust = 0.5, nbreak = 1)
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = klocus_colors, name = "K-locus", na.value = "grey90")

# --- Ring 2: Virulence traits (red) ---
p <- p +
  new_scale_fill() +
  geom_fruit(
    data    = virulence_data,
    geom    = geom_tile,
    mapping = aes(y = label, x = Trait, fill = as.factor(Presence)),
    offset  = 0.01,
    pwidth  = 0.15,
    axis.params = list(axis = "x", text.angle = -90, text.size = 3,
                       hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5, nbreak = length(virulence_cols))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("0" = "white", "1" = "#E41A1C"),
    name   = "Virulence",
    labels = c("Absent", "Present"),
    na.value = "grey90"
  )

# --- Ring 3: Genotypic AMR acquired genes (blue) ---
p <- p +
  new_scale_fill() +
  geom_fruit(
    data    = genotypic_data,
    geom    = geom_tile,
    mapping = aes(y = label, x = Gene, fill = as.factor(Presence)),
    offset  = 0.01,
    pwidth  = 0.25,
    axis.params = list(axis = "x", text.angle = -90, text.size = 3,
                       hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5,
                       nbreak = length(unique(genotypic_data$Gene)))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("0" = "white", "1" = "#377EB8"),
    name   = "Genotypic AMR",
    labels = c("Absent", "Present"),
    na.value = "grey90"
  )

# --- Ring 4: AMR mutations (orange, outermost) ---
p <- p +
  new_scale_fill() +
  geom_fruit(
    data    = mutation_data,
    geom    = geom_tile,
    mapping = aes(y = label, x = Mutation, fill = as.factor(Presence)),
    offset  = 0.01,
    pwidth  = 0.12,
    axis.params = list(axis = "x", text.angle = -90, text.size = 3,
                       hjust = 0, vjust = 0.5,
                       nbreak = length(unique(mutation_data$Mutation)))
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c("0" = "white", "1" = "#FF7F00"),
    name   = "AMR mutations",
    labels = c("Absent", "Present"),
    na.value = "grey90"
  )

# --- Theme ---
p <- p +
  theme(
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.title    = element_text(size = 10, face = "bold"),
    legend.text     = element_text(size = 9),
    legend.box      = "vertical"
  )

print(p)
```

## Diagnostics

```{r diagnostics}
# ST distribution
cat("ST Distribution (Top 10 + Other):\n")
metadata %>% count(ST_category, sort = TRUE) %>% print()

cat("\nK-locus Distribution (Top 10 + Other):\n")
metadata %>% count(K_locus_category, sort = TRUE) %>% print()

cat("\nTip label suffixes applied:\n")
metadata %>%
  count(suffix = if_else(is.na(suffix), "(no match)", suffix)) %>%
  print()
```

## Export

```{r save, eval=FALSE}
ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "fig05_kpn_phylotree_annotated.pdf"),
  plot = p, width = 22, height = 18
)
ggsave(
  file.path(out_dir, "fig05_kpn_phylotree_annotated.png"),
  plot = p, width = 22, height = 18, dpi = 300
)
cat("Saved fig05_kpn_phylotree_annotated.pdf and .png\n")
```

## Session Info

```{r session-info}
sessionInfo()
```
